hero.title: Play, drink, eat

hero.description: Entry fee for board game players. Price is 50 CZK for board game players who order something from us and 100 CZK for customers with zero spending.

about.description: Entry fee for board game players. Price is 50 CZK for board game players who order something from us and 100 CZK for customers with zero spending. Entry fee is valid for 1 day without time limit. For children under 15 years old, entry is free. MONDAY WITHOUT ENTRY FEE.

metadata.title: Deskohub - Board Game Bar
metadata.description: Play, drink, eat - everything at one table. Visit the best board game bar for all board game enthusiasts.
